who: billing coordinators in medical clinics processing 10–20 invoices/month
offer: For billing coordinators in medical clinics processing 10–20 invoices/month, high denial rates cause cash flow gaps. We automate appeal template generation instead of manual appeal writing and tracking.
problem: High rate of medical billing denials leading to delayed revenue.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for billing coordinators
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on billing workflows
DM outreach to billing coordinators with demo video
Share resources in community forums for billing tools
try_it: Let users try template library for common denial reasons
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Create a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for initial users
Post weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
